subject: GRB 230116D: KGO RC-25 optical observations
body:
S. Belkin (IKI, HSE),  A. V. Samokhvalov (citizen scientist, Surgut), 
A. Pozanenko (IKI),  N. Pankov (HSE, IKI) report on behalf of GRB IKI FuN:

We observed the optical afterglow (Zhu et al., GCN 33177; Nazarov  et 
al., GCN 33178; Moskvitin et al. GCNs 33179, 33187; Swain et al., GCN 
33182; Belkin et al., GCN 33189) of GRB 230116D (Sonbas et al., GCN 
33176) with 25cm 1/8 Ritchey-Chretien  telescope of KGO observatory. 
Observation started on 2023-01-16 (UT) 21:21:41. The series consist of 
images with an exposure of 600 s in R-filter. Preliminary photometry of 
the stacked image is following

Date UT-start       Exptime Filter t-T0     OT     Err    UL
2023-01-16 23:36:12 11*600  R      0.16075  20.25  0.20   20.4
